training_dataset: Permissive and non-copyrighted audio sources documented by the model card
review_notes: The upstream model repository identifies Kokoro-82M weights as Apache-2.0 and documents production deployment.
The upstream model card states that training audio was permissive or non-copyrighted, including public-domain and permissively licensed sources.
The selected af_heart, am_fenrir, and am_onyx voices are part of the same upstream model repository.
Re-review upstream terms before redistributing model or voice files. This is an operational review, not legal advice.
